title: T-003 — Reference.DeptColumns metadata table + Drizzle schema
prompt:
# T-003 — Reference.DeptColumns metadata table

PRD: 01-NPD-PRD.md §4.2 (ADR-028 schema-driven backbone)
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Create Reference.DeptColumns metadata table that drives schema-driven dept proxy views, RHF Zod resolvers, runtime validators, and IsAllRequiredFilled checks.

## Implementation contract
Migration 0012 emits CREATE TABLE "Reference.DeptColumns" per §4.2: column_name PK, tenant_id, dept (Core|Planning|Commercial|Production|Technical|MRP|Procurement|System), data_type (text|number|date|dropdown|auto), dropdown_source nullable, blocking_rule TEXT, required_for_done BOOLEAN, display_order INT, marker TEXT, schema_version INT, created_at. Index (tenant_id, dept, display_order). Drizzle schema in packages/db/src/schema/reference-dept-columns.ts. RLS policy.

## Files
- packages/db/migrations/0012_reference_dept_columns.sql [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/reference-dept-columns.ts [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/index.ts [modify]
- packages/db/__tests__/reference-dept-columns.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given migration 0012 ran, when querying schema, then Reference.DeptColumns has (tenant_id, dept, display_order) index and RLS enabled
2. Given a row with data_type='dropdown' and dropdown_source NULL, when INSERT runs, then it fails CHECK constraint
3. Given Drizzle schema imported, when typecheck runs, then DeptColumn Insert/Select types compile with strict

## Test strategy
- RED: tests for index existence + dropdown_source CHECK + Drizzle types
- Run 'pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter db test reference-dept-columns && pnpm --filter db typecheck'

## Risk red lines
- Do not allow data_type values outside enum
- Do not skip RLS
- Do not seed values here (separate seed task T-016)
